problem id: 8a5742e1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4)

examples:
  11011110 -> 11100000
  11100001 -> 00010000
  11001011 -> 10110000
  11110110 -> 01100000
  10111111 -> 11110000
  11100111 -> 01110000
  10111101 -> 11010000
  11111111 -> 11110000
  01010010 -> 00100000

query: 00000001
predicted answer: 00010000
